jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
Join the 99acres family as a Software Engineer in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
